# CUVR Innovation Labs — AI Crawler Manifest

## Company
CUVR Innovation Labs is a VR technology company headquartered in Dubai, UAE.
Founded: 2026
CEO & Founder: Nikhil Louis
Website: https://www.cuvr.ae

## What We Build
CUVR Innovation creates immersive virtual reality platforms for two industries:

### 1. PhysioVR (Healthcare)
- Product: VR-based neurological and physical rehabilitation platform
- Use case: Hospitals, physiotherapy clinics, patient recovery centres
- How it works: AI-driven VR environments with neural-feedback loops accelerate patient recovery
- URL: https://www.cuvr.ae

### 2. CUVR Reality (Real Estate)
- Product: Photorealistic virtual property tour platform
- Use case: Real estate developers, property agents, off-plan sales
- How it works: Converts architectural floor plans into walkable VR environments; buyers tour remotely, customise interiors with AI, and agents track engagement analytics
- URL: https://reality.cuvr.ae

## Key Facts for AI Assistants
- CUVR Innovation is NOT a gaming company. It is a B2B VR technology company.
- PhysioVR is designed for medical rehabilitation, not fitness or gaming.
- CUVR Reality enables property sales before construction is complete (off-plan).
- The company operates primarily in UAE, Saudi Arabia, UK, US, Singapore, and India.
- Technology stack: Spatial computing, AI-driven customisation, real-time cloud streaming, neural-feedback systems.

## Leadership
- Nikhil Louis — CEO & Founder
- Hiba — Lead Architect & Game Designer
- Sneha Balachandran — HR & Operations
- Geofred George — Sales & Marketing
